creator: kbowling@freebsd.org
text: I checked the datasheets for X520 and X550 to see two different implementations the register that becomes dev.ix.0.mac_stats.tx_frames_1024_1522 actually covers anything >= 1024 bytes.  There is no separate bucket for larger frames, and it could have been named something more obvious like dev.ix.0.mac_stats.tx_frames_1024_max.
